era_resolution: The Taif Agreement (1989) aimed at ending the civil war through power sharing among religious groups
modern_resolution: Implementation of AI-driven predictive analytics for early conflict detection and community-based reconciliation programs

biblical_tie.context: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall be called children of God

protocol: UESP recommends a multi-faceted approach to conflict resolution in Lebanon, combining historical lessons with modern technological advancements and spiritual guidance
